message:
feat(console): add migration status and table info renderables

New renderable components:
- Add migration_status.rs for displaying migration state
- Add table_info.rs for table structure display

Core updates:
- Extend renderables/mod.rs with new module exports
- Enhance schema_tree.rs for improved schema visualization
- Update Cargo.lock with dependencies

These components improve the console TUI's ability to show
database schema and migration status at a glance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
